description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a smooth, solid white material. The sofa features three large, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and seamlessly integrated into the frame. The armrests are present on both sides, with a low, straight profile and subtle padding that blends into the overall boxy silhouette. The sofa stands on six short, dark-colored legs that are slightly tapered and positioned at the corners and center for stability. The backrest is high and straight, providing full support across the width of the sofa, and the upholstery is free of visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, white three-seater sofa with attached cushions, low straight armrests, and short dark legs, featuring a minimalist and seamless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, low straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the straight profile of the armrest, and the thickness of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, high backrest and the alignment of the six short legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion profile, emphasizing the sofa's boxy silhouette.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all attached and seamlessly integrated, forming a continuous seating and back surface.
attribute_armrest_style: Low, straight armrests with subtle padding, integrated into the sofa's boxy frame, matching the height of the seat and backrest base, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six short, dark-colored legs, slightly tapered, positioned at the four corners and two central points for support, with a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with three attached cushions, providing full-width support and a clean, minimalist appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid white upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
